/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/stem_engine_ffi.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libstem_engine_ffi.so -o libstem_engine_ffi.so CMakeFiles/stem_engine_ffi.dir/src/bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem_engine_ffi.dir/src/AudioDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem_engine_ffi.dir/src/AudioEncoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem_engine_ffi.dir/src/DemucsInference.cpp.o  -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -lswresample /usr/lib/libonnxruntime.so
